data.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities dividend declines by 40.1% to $0.065
data.description:
• Algonquin Power & Utilities (NYSE:AQN) declares $0.065/share quarterly dividend, -40.1% decrease from prior dividend of $0.108.
  • Forward yield 4.2%
  • Payable Oct. 15; for shareholders of record Sept. 30; ex-div Sept. 30.
  • See AQN Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Rakuten GAAP EPS of -¥35.41, revenue of ¥1050.91B; reaffirms FY24 outlook
data.description:
• Rakuten press release (OTCPK:RKUNY): 1H GAAP EPS of -¥35.41.
  • Revenue of ¥1050.91B (+8.0% Y/Y).
  • At present, in the forecast for the consolidated performance of the current fiscal year, we aim for double-digit growth in consolidated revenue, excluding the impact of the stock market on securities services, compared to the previous fiscal year

data.title: Jamieson Wellness raises quarterly dividend by ~11%
data.description:
• Jamieson Wellness (TSX:JWEL:CA) declared $0.21/share quarterly dividend, 10.5% increase from prior dividend of $0.19.
  • Payable Sept. 13; for shareholders of record Aug. 30; ex-div Aug. 30.
  • See JWEL:CA Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Montauk Renewables GAAP EPS of -$0.01, revenue of $43.3M
data.description:

data.title: Sendas Distribuidora reports Q2 results
data.description:
• Sendas Distribuidora (NYSE:ASAI): Q2 EBITDA in the quarter totaled R$ 965 million, an increase of R$ 150 million or +18.4%, with a margin of 5.4% (+0.3 p.p. vs. 2Q23).
  • Revenue of R$17.87B (+11.8% Y/Y).
  • Net income in the pre-IFRS16 view totaled R$ 165 million in 2Q24, with net margin of 0.9%.
  • The operational cash generation totaled R$ 7.6 billion over the past 24 months.

data.title: SmartCentres REIT GAAP EPS of C$0.71, revenue of C$133.22M
data.description:
• SmartCentres REIT press release (OTCPK:CWYUF): Q2 GAAP EPS of C$0.71.
